skills.title: ForgeUI
skills.description: Developer-first dark app design system. High-contrast IDE aesthetic with pastel accent cards, bento grids, and seamless light/dark mode toggling.

skills.title: Aegis Glow
skills.description: Obsidian Glow Fintech UI. Luxurious metallic financial interfaces with cinematic copper lighting, glassmorphic cards, and dual-theme parity.

skills.title: Ecovolt
skills.description: Eco-Brutalist Clean Tech design. Stark architectural typography meets organic softness with neon lime accents and floating glassmorphic overlays.

skills.title: Nova AI
skills.description: Radiant Soft-Glass AI design. Airy SaaS interfaces with sunburst gradients, floating 3D glassmorphic cards, and warm AI Spark accents.

skills.title: Big Shaped
skills.description: Big Shaped design system. Stark architectural typography meets organic softness with neon lime accents and floating glassmorphic overlays.

skills.title: Quantify
skills.description: Data-Dense Analytics UI. High-structure, information-rich interfaces with vibrant lime-green accents and crisp flexible card layouts.

skills.title: PureWealth
skills.description: Warm Minimalist SaaS Design. Sophisticated palette of pure white and soft beige with asymetrical bento grid layouts.

skills.title: AuraWealth
skills.description: Organic FinTech Design. Structured UI components floating above deep, blurred nature motifs with striking lime accents.

skills.title: FluxBoard
skills.description: Premium Kanban Design. Neo-Dark Bento style with high contrast, vibrant accent blocks, and ambient productivity glows.

skills.title: VoxAI
skills.description: Ethereal SaaS Design. Atmospheric ambient backgrounds with stark, highly-structured foreground elements and AI-centric enterprise interfaces.

skills.title: Epoch
skills.description: Neon Brutalist SaaS Design. High-contrast, vibrant, and energetic design with massive typography and neon accents.

skills.title: Synthetix
skills.description: Editorial Brutalist Design. High-end, stark marketing pages that prioritize massive typography, stark contrasts, and bento-box layouts.
